dimensions.rationale: No conversation turns were provided to evaluate. With an empty transcript, no anti-patterns could be triggered. Per the rubric, zero anti-patterns tripped scores a 3, though this is a vacuous pass rather than demonstrated skill.
dimensions.notes: Transcript was empty. Score reflects the rubric's literal criterion (no anti-patterns tripped = 3), but no positive avoidance behavior could be observed either.

dimensions.rationale: There is no conversation provided to evaluate — only the client profile and scenario setup. Without any coach utterances, there is no observable evidence of VIEW state (vulnerability, impartiality, empathy, wonder). Per scoring rules, I cannot award 2 or 3 without evidence of the coach occupying the stance. The absence of any demonstrated coaching presence defaults to the lowest score, as no VIEW components can be verified.
dimensions.notes: No conversation transcript was supplied. Score reflects absence of evidence rather than observed poor stance.

dimensions.rationale: There is no conversation to evaluate — only the client profile was provided and no client turns exist. Without any client text, there is no evidence of language shift, somatic softening, or the breakthrough condition (feeling the abyss of being adored) being met. By definition, the client ended in the same state they started (i.e., not at all), so this scores 1.
dimensions.notes: No conversation transcript was supplied in the user message; scoring reflects absence of any client movement.

dimensions.rationale: No conversation was provided to evaluate — only the client profile and scenario setup. With zero coach utterances, there are no moves to assess for match-to-read, sequencing, timing, or recovery. Per the rubric, absence of any AoA-specific moves and no demonstrated reads-to-moves matching defaults to the poor band.
dimensions.notes: Conversation transcript was empty in the input. Scoring reflects absence of any intervention to evaluate.

dimensions.rationale: The conversation provided is empty — there are no coach turns to evaluate. With no signature questions, no framework invocations, no distinction language, and no demonstrated AoA moves at all, there is no evidence of methodology fidelity. A coach who produces nothing cannot have used the methodology appropriately; this defaults to the lowest score by absence of any AoA-specific content.
dimensions.notes: No conversation content was provided to score. Scoring reflects complete absence of methodology content.

dimensions.rationale: There is no conversation to evaluate — the transcript is empty. With no coach turns visible, there are no reads to score. Per the rubric, silent/absent reads cannot be credited, and a coach who never names a read in text cannot score above 1.
dimensions.notes: Empty transcript provided; scoring defaults to 1 because no visible reads exist.
